replies.msg:
ffmpeg 4.1.3
Windows 10 1903 18362.116
Threadripper 1950x
64GB RAM
所有嘢擺喺SSD

script如下:
@ECHO OFF
setlocal ENABLEDELAYEDEXPANSION
:LOOP
if "%~1"=="" goto :END
set filename=%~1
for %%A in ("%filename%") do (
 set tmp1=%%~nA
 set tmp2=Encoded_HEVC_%%~nA
)
set filename=!filename:%tmp1%=%tmp2%!

:: 2 Pass 8192k
ffmpeg -y -i "%~1" -c:v libx265 -preset slow -pix_fmt yuv420p10le -b:v 8192k -x265-params pass=1 -an -f matroska NUL && ^
ffmpeg      -i "%~1" -c:v libx265 -preset slow -pix_fmt yuv420p10le -b:v 8192k -x265-params pass=2 -c:a copy "%filename%"
del x265_2pass* /f /q

shift
goto :LOOP
:END
pause


不論pass 1定pass 2同埋preset係medium,slow,veryslow定係placebo
都只係用到大約一半CPU
想問吓點樣改可以用盡佢
(同時行兩個唔計, 同埋windows only)

正常，x264 x265食唔盡所有core

intel-svt (svt-hevc, svt-av1)就得啦，quality唔知了

x264 265最多食到16條thread 好似係
再上就冇咩意思

replies.msg:
今次試吓直接用x265
但係唔知點解淨係出嚿咁嘅嘢畀我



@ECHO OFF
setlocal ENABLEDELAYEDEXPANSION
:LOOP
if "%~1"=="" goto :END
set filename=%~1
for %%A in ("%filename%") do (
 set tmp1=%%~nA
 set tmp2=Encoded_HEVC_%%~nA
)
set filename=!filename:%tmp1%=%tmp2%!
ffmpeg -i "%~1" -map 0:v -c copy "%tmp1%.264"
ffmpeg -i "%~1" -map 0:a -c copy "%tmp1%.aac"
x265 --input "%tmp1%.264" --input-res 1920x1080 --fps 60 --preset slower --level-idc 62 --vbv-maxrate 8192 --vbv-bufsize 8192 --output-depth 10 --pass 1 --output NUL
x265 --input "%tmp1%.264" --input-res 1920x1080 --fps 60 --preset slower --level-idc 62 --vbv-maxrate 8192 --vbv-bufsize 8192 --output-depth 10 --pass 2 --output "%tmp1%.265"
:: ffmpeg -i "%tmp1%.265" -c copy -map 0 output.mkv
del x265_2pass* /f /q
del "%tmp1%.264" /f /q
del "%tmp1%.aac" /f /q
::del "%tmp1%.265" /f /q
shift
goto :LOOP
:END
pause

可以試下行pipe, 即係ffmpeg專做decode only, 再獨立並行x265做encode
ffmpeg -i "input" -map 0:v -f yuv4mpegpipe - | x265 - --y4m -o "output"
